mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_comment (movie_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE movie_comment SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, is_edited = TRUE, update_time = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM movie_comment WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.tmdb_id = #{tmdbId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT AVG(c.rating) FROM movie_comment c JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.tmdb_id = #{tmdbId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment c JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.tmdb_id = #{tmdbId}
